login.title: Login
login.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
login.registrationPendingVerification: Registration successful! Please check your email to verify your account before logging in.
login.verificationSent: Verification email sent! Check your inbox.
login.errorOauthFailed: OAuth authentication failed. Please try again.
login.errorNoEmail: No email was provided by the OAuth provider. Please use a different sign-in method.
login.errorEmailAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Log in with your password first, then link the provider from your profile.
login.errorCredentialsInvalid: Login failed. Please check your credentials.

register.title: Register
register.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
register.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
register.errorEmailExists: User with this email already exists.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account with that email exists, we've sent a password reset link. Please check your inbox.
forgotPassword.instructions: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
forgotPassword.errorFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
resetPassword.errorFailed: Password reset failed. The token may be invalid or expired.

verifyEmail.title: Email Verification
verifyEmail.successMessage: Your email has been verified. You can now log in to your account.
verifyEmail.errorFailed: Email verification failed. The token may be invalid or expired.

forbidden.title: Access Forbidden
forbidden.message: You don't have permission to access this resource.

profile.passwordPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep current password
profile.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
profile.currentPasswordRequired: Current password is required to change your password
profile.errorLinkFailed: Failed to link OAuth account. Please try again.
profile.errorLoadFailed: Failed to load profile. Please try again.
profile.errorUpdateFailed: Failed to update profile. Please try again.
